rationale: Profile is a Business Analyst/Accountant at Infosys with a fictional company (Initech) stint, marketing manager summary, and no ML, retrieval, or ranking experience whatsoever.

9.9 years as a Java/DevOps/QA engineer across Wayne Enterprises (fictional), Cognizant, TCS, and Zomato with no production ML or ranking work; pgvector and MLflow listed as skills but career history shows pure infrastructure and frontend roles with only self-learner AI exposure.
6 years as Mechanical Engineer and Civil Engineer at fictional companies (Dunder Mifflin, Pied Piper) and TCS, with only beginner-level infrastructure tools and no ML, NLP, or retrieval experience.

IISc M.E. in Machine Learning provides strong educational signal, but 4.5 years of actual work is entirely web/backend/DevOps at Accenture and Acme Corp with no production ML deployment, and skills list (SAP, TTS, Vue.js) does not reflect the ML education.
